This is a Lean 4 / Mathlib repository for quantum complexity theory, centered on
MIP* = RE and low-degree tests. Your ONLY task is to scout Mathlib and the
existing codebase for relevant lemmas and post a scouting report. Do NOT write
code or create files. Be thorough -- search multiple keywords and naming
conventions. Mathlib sources are under .lake/packages/mathlib/Mathlib/.
